input.task:
Build a workflow with:
1. A Manual Trigger node
2. A Wait node set to 1 second
3. A Set node named "running state test"

Connect them in order: Manual Trigger → Wait (1 second) → Set ("running state test")
input.conversationContext: No credentials available. Building a simple 3-node workflow: Manual Trigger → Wait (1s) → Set node named "running state test".

output.result: Error: direct builder calls require `bypassPlan: true` + an existing `workflowId` + a one-sentence `reason`. Use that combination for any edit to an existing workflow. For new workflows, multi-workflow builds, or data-table schema changes, call `plan` with a `build-workflow` task instead — the planner discovers credentials, data tables, and best practices, and schedules an orchestrator-run verification checkpoint.

input.summary: Build a minimal manual-trigger workflow with a 1-second Wait node and a Set node named 'running state test', then run it immediately after building.
assumptions: Wait node is configured for a resume-after-time-interval of 1 second
Set node named 'running state test' makes no field changes (acts as a labeled passthrough)
Workflow is run via manual execution immediately after build

item.name: Running State Test
item.purpose: A simple test workflow triggered manually. It pauses for 1 second using a Wait node, then passes through a Set node named 'running state test'. The workflow is designed to verify running state behavior and will be executed immediately after it is built.

output.result: Added: Build 'Running State Test' workflow (1 item total)

item.title: Verify 'Running State Test' workflow runs successfully
item.instructions: Use the work item ID from the build outcome for wf-running-state-test to call verify-built-workflow. Confirm the execution completes without errors, passes through the Wait node (1-second pause), and reaches the 'running state test' Set node. Pass condition: execution completes with no errors and all three nodes show successful output.

output.result: Added: Verify 'Running State Test' workflow runs successfully (2 items total)

input.name: Running State Test

input.result: Execution ID 5 completed successfully in ~1 second. All three nodes (Manual Trigger → Wait 1 Second → running state test) produced successful output with no errors.
